description: Send notifications to your own Nextcloud destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise nclouds:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Nextcloud admin notification directly to your Nextcloud server's notification API, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-nextcloud

request.template: {"urls":"nclouds://${ customer_secrets.NEXTCLOUD_HOST }/${ customer_secrets.NEXTCLOUD_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"nclouds://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
shortMessage={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&longMessage={* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *}
shortMessage={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&longMessage={* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *}
